note: All debut-volume manga (no light novels) releasing this month and next per otakucalendar.com, ranked against your collection. Covers link to Barnes & Noble.

items.why: Colonialism, religious horror and a trans swordsman champion — artsy queer seinen right in The Summer Hikaru Died lane.
Shonen Jump's new part-timer-meets-model romcom; breezy VIZ slice-of-life in your Skip and Loafer wheelhouse.
Nakayama's legendary Fuan no Tane finally in print — surreal short-form dread for the horror shelf.
A fox falls for the rabbit it meant to eat — a soft predator/prey yuri debut for the GL streak.

items.meta: Aug 4 · VIZ Shojo Beat · shoujo romance
items.why: New romance from Io Sakisaka (Ao Haru Ride) — polished, tender slice-of-life romcom.

items.t: I'm Fine With Being the Second Girlfriend, Vol. 1
items.why: Two people settling for second-best; a grown-up, spicy romcom under the Ghost Ship label.
A baseball-team love triangle — sports-manga energy meets BL; worth a look if the story holds.

items.t: You Might As Well Be the One, Vol. 1
items.why: Dessert-magazine romance about being liked for who you are — grounded slice-of-life romcom.
Humans as endangered species in a chimera world — moody, atmospheric fantasy romance.
A magical medical drama on dragonback — cozy, workmanlike fantasy slice-of-life.
Firefighter reunites with his first love, now a single dad — full-color BL manhwa judged on a solid hook.

items.t: Magic Doctor Rex's Perverted Medical Record, Vol. 1
items.why: Post-Demon-King clinic comedy of very odd ailments — squarely for the ecchi shelf.
PANDANIA's lazy-cat gag comic — light Days on Fes-style comfort reading.
The Solo Leveling sequel comic — liquid action, though the leveling/isekai frame isn't your core.

items.t: The Bubble Love of the Mermaid, Vol. 1
items.why: Agitogi (My Happy Marriage) mermaid romance — pretty but conventional; only if curious.
Role-reversal romance, a double-identity 'princess' and a cursed prince — fun premise, niche.

items.t: Marriage to the Wolf: An Interspecies Union, Vol. 1
items.why: Arranged wolf-and-rabbit BL debut — sweet but slight unless the story wins you over.

items.t: The Crow's Ballad at Dawn, Vol. 1
items.why: Red-light-district love story — atmospheric BL one-shot for a curious pick.
Single-volume omegaverse BL — self-contained, only if the setup grabs you.

items.t: Mistress Kanan is Devilishly Easy (Omnibus), Vol. 1
items.why: Teasing ecchi romcom in a two-in-one omnibus — light fan-service fare.

items.t: Not Your Typical Reincarnation Story, Vol. 1
items.why: Villainess-reincarnation webtoon romance — squarely the isekai lane you skip.

items.t: History of the Kingdom of Orcsen, Vol. 1
items.meta: Jul 7 · Seven Seas · isekai grimdark fantasy
items.why: Orcs burning down elfland — grimdark isekai war fantasy, not your shelf.
